title: Bell-Boeing Wins a $61M Contract to Support CV-22 Jets
text: Bell-Boeing, a joint venture between Boeing (BA) and Bell Helicopter - a unit of Textron (TXT) - is going to support the production line incorporation of nacelle improvements for the CV-22 aircraft.

title: Textron: A Post-Pandemic Winner
text: Textron's stock price has underperformed its industry peers and the market, in general, after the pandemic as a result of its significant commercial aerospace exposure. The good news is that financials have bottomed. High EBITDA growth lies ahead with support from strengthening demand and improving margins.

title: Textron Aviation Celebrates First Delivery of the New Cessna SkyCourier to Launch Customer FedEx Express
text: WICHITA, Kan.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Textron Aviation has announced the first delivery of the Cessna SkyCourier twin utility turboprop to FedEx Express.

title: Despite Rising Jet Deliveries There Is A Better Pick Over Textron Stock
text: We think that Intuit stock (NASDAQ: INTU), a company that specializes in financial and tax preparation software, is currently a better pick than Textron stock (NYSE: TXT), best known for its helicopters and jets, despite it being the more expensive of the two, trading at 9.5x trailing revenues co.
